dctools 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Changelog

Source: NEWS.md

dctools (development version)

  • Initial package scaffold (renamed from the helpers script collection).
  • Project scaffolding: create_project() (analysis + package archetypes) and make_file_dirs().
  • Package & environment helpers: read_packages(), load_packages(), configure_parallel().
  • Data validation: assert_columns(), check_unique_id(), flag_out_of_range().
  • Data-intake QC: describe_cohort(), detect_missing_sentinels(), check_colnames(), clean_colnames(), check_types(), check_constant_cols(), check_collinearity().
  • PHI-safe output: suppress_small_cells().
  • Clinical formulas: ckd_epi_2021().
  • House plotting / tables: theme_dc(), tbl1().

Developed by David Chen.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
